mapper.sql: id, task_id, project_id, notified_user_id, notified_email, notification_date, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delay_notification_record (id, task_id, project_id, notified_user_id, notified_email, notification_date, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{taskId}, #{projectId}, #{notifiedUserId}, #{notifiedEmail}, #{notificationDate}, #{createdAt})
